---
title: "fingerprints"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(extrafont)
loadfonts()
```


```{r}

# these interpret functions are different ways of changing the labels on the plots
# since we want different labels for different fingerprint codes
# to best convey the information in the plots

interpret_event_specific = function(cond) {
    if (cond == 'sameEv-sameSchema') {
       return('same event')
    } else if (cond == 'otherEv-sameSchema') {
      return('other event') 
    } else if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
      return('same event')
    } else if (cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
      return('other event')
    }
}

interpret_schema_specific = function(cond) {
    if (cond == 'sameEv-sameSchema') {
       return('same schema')
    } else if (cond == 'otherEv-sameSchema') {
      return('same schema') 
    } else if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
      return('other schema')
    } else if (cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
      return('other schema')
    }
}

interpret_path_specific = function(cond) {
    if (cond == 'sameEv-sameSchema') {
       return('same path')
    } else if (cond == 'otherEv-sameSchema') {
      return('other path') 
    } else if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
      return('other path')
    } else if (cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
      return('other path')
    }
}


interpret_path_specific = function(cond) {
    if (cond == 'sameEv-sameSchema') {
       return('same path')
    } else if (cond == 'otherEv-sameSchema') {
      return('other path') 
    } else if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
      return('other path')
    } else if (cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
      return('other path')
    }
}

interpret_rotated = function(cond, event_template, event_matching) {
    if (cond == 'sameEv-sameSchema') {
       return('same path')
    } else if (cond == 'otherEv-sameSchema') {
      return('other path') 
    } else if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
      return('other path')
    } else if (cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
      return('other path')
    }
}



interpret = function(cond, template_id, event_match_id) {
  
    # if we didn't get one of the easy mappings
    if (cond == 'sameEv-sameSchema') {
       return('correct-path')
    } else if (cond == 'otherEv-sameSchema') {
      return('other-path-from-same-schema')
    }
    # then do the conditionals
    # if event2 is used as template, then:
    # - during event2 TRs the same-event/other-schema condition is the visually-matched-path and the other-event/other-schema condition is the unrelated-path.
    # - during event3 TRs the other-event/other-schema condition is the visually-matched-path and the same-event/other-schema condition is the unrelated-path.
    # - during event4 TRs the same-event/other-schema condition is the visually-matched-path and the other-event/other-schema condition is the unrelated-path.
    if (template_id == 2) {
        if (event_match_id == 2) {
            if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
                return('visually-matched-path')
            }
            else if (cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
                return('unrelated-path')
            }
        } else if (event_match_id == 3) {
            if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
               return('unrelated-path')
            }
            else if (cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
              return('visually-matched-path')
            }
                
        } else if (event_match_id == 4) {
            if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
              return('visually-matched-path')
            }
            else if(cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
              return('unrelated-path')
            }
        } else {
          print("Error: event_match_id invalid",event_match_id )
        }
    }
    # if event3 is used as template, then:
    # - during event2 TRs the other-event/other-schema condition is the visually-matched-path and the same-event/other-schema condition is the unrelated-path.
    # - during event3 TRs the same-event/other-schema condition is the visually-matched-path and the other-event/other-schema condition is the unrelated-path.
    # - during event4 TRs the other-event/other-schema condition is the visually-matched-path and the same-event/other-schema condition is the unrelated-path.
    else if (template_id == 3) {
        if (event_match_id == 2) {
            if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
              return('unrelated-path')
            } else if (cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
              return('visually-matched-path')
            }
        } else if (event_match_id == 3) {
            if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
              return('visually-matched-path')
            } else if (cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
              return('unrelated-path')
            }
        } else if (event_match_id == 4) {
            if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
               return('unrelated-path')
            } else if (cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
              return('visually-matched-path')
            }
        } else {
           print("Error: event_match_id invalid",event_match_id)
        }
    }
    # if event4 is used as template, then:
    # - during event2 TRs the same-event/other-schema condition is the visually-matched-path and the other-event/other-schema condition is the unrelated-path.
    # - during event3 TRs the other-event/other-schema condition is the visually-matched-path and the same-event/other-schema condition is the unrelated-path.
    # - during event4 TRs the same-event/other-schema condition is the visually-matched-path and the other-event/other-schema condition is the unrelated-path.
    else if (template_id == 4) {
        if (event_match_id == 2) {
            if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
              return('visually-matched-path')
            } else if (cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
              return('unrelated-path')
            }
        } else if (event_match_id == 3) {
           if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
             return('unrelated-path')
           }
            else if (cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
              return('visually-matched-path')
            }
        }
        else if (event_match_id == 4) {
            if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
              return('visually-matched-path')
            }
            else if (cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
                return('unrelated-path')  
            }
        } else {
          print("Error: event_match_id invalid",event_match_id )
        }
    } else {
        print("Error: template_id invalid")
    }
}
   
interpret2 = function(cond) {
    if (cond == 'sameEv-sameSchema') {
       return('path1')
    } else if (cond == 'otherEv-sameSchema') {
      return('path2') 
    } else if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
      return('path3')
    } else if (cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
      return('path4')
    }
  
}

get_new_path_ids = function(raw_df, code_name) {
  if (code_name == "null") {
    return(raw_df$path_id)
  }
  index = 0
  new_list = c()
  for (path_id in raw_df$path_id) {
    index = index + 1
    if (code_name == "event_specific") {
       new_list = c(new_list, interpret_event_specific(path_id))
    } else if (code_name == "schema_specific") {
      new_list = c(new_list, interpret_schema_specific(path_id))
    } else if (code_name == "path_specific") {
      new_list = c(new_list, interpret_path_specific(path_id))
    } else if (code_name == "rotated") {
      new_list = c(new_list, )
    }
    
  }
  return(new_list)
}

get_new_template_ids = function(raw_df) {
  new_list = c()
  for (match in raw_df$event_template_id) {
    if (match == 2) {
      new_list = c(new_list,"event 2 template")
    } else if (match == 3) {
      new_list = c(new_list,"event 3 template")
    } else if (match == 4) {
      new_list = c(new_list,"event 4 template")
    } else {
      new_list = c(new_list,"other")
    }
  }
  return(new_list)
}

get_new_template_ids_old = function(raw_df) {
  new_list = c()
  for (match in raw_df$event_template_id) {
    if (match == 2) {
      new_list = c(new_list,"campfire/flower (2)")
    } else if (match == 3) {
      new_list = c(new_list,"coin/torch (3)")
    } else if (match == 4) {
      new_list = c(new_list,"egg/painting (4)")
    } else {
      new_list = c(new_list,"other")
    }
  }
  return(new_list)
}


get_new_matching_ids = function(raw_df) {
  new_list = c()
  for (match in raw_df$event_matching_id) {
    if (match == 2) {
      new_list = c(new_list,"apply to event 2")
    } else if (match == 3) {
      new_list = c(new_list,"apply to event 3")
    } else if (match == 4) {
      new_list = c(new_list,"apply to event 4")
    } else {
      new_list = c(new_list,"other")
    }
  }
  return(new_list)
}



                    
```

```{r}



# these functions are to replace the observed data in raw_df with idealized plots


get_event_specific_ideal_corr = function(raw_df) {
  corr_list = c()
  lb_list = c()
  ub_list = c()
  index = 0
  mean_plant = 0.05
  b_sd = 0.01
  for (path_id in raw_df$path_id) {
    index = index + 1
    if (path_id == 'sameEv-sameSchema') {
       mean = mean_plant + rnorm(1, mean = 0, sd = 0.005)
       corr_list = c(corr_list, mean)
       lb_list = c(lb_list, mean - b_sd)
       ub_list = c(ub_list, mean + b_sd)
       
    } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-sameSchema') {
       mean = 0 + rnorm(1, mean = 0, sd = 0.005)
       corr_list = c(corr_list, mean)
       lb_list = c(lb_list, mean - b_sd)
       ub_list = c(ub_list, mean + b_sd)
       
    } else if (path_id == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
       mean = mean_plant + rnorm(1, mean = 0, sd = 0.005)
       corr_list = c(corr_list, mean)
       lb_list = c(lb_list, mean - b_sd)
       ub_list = c(ub_list, mean + b_sd)
       
    } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
       mean = 0 + rnorm(1, mean = 0, sd = 0.005)
       corr_list = c(corr_list, mean)
       lb_list = c(lb_list, mean - b_sd)
       ub_list = c(ub_list, mean + b_sd)
    }
  }
  raw_df$corr = corr_list
  raw_df$lower_bound = lb_list
  raw_df$upper_bound = ub_list
  return(raw_df)
}

get_event_specific_3by3 = function(raw_df) {
  corr_list = c()
  lb_list = c()
  ub_list = c()
  index = 0
  mean_plant = 0.0031
  b_sd = 0.0009
  for (path_id in raw_df$path_id) {
    index = index + 1
    template_id = raw_df$event_template_id[index]
    matching_id = raw_df$event_matching_id[index]
    if (template_id == matching_id) {
      if (path_id == 'sameEv-sameSchema') {
         mean = mean_plant + 0.00045
      } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-sameSchema') {
         mean = 0 + 0.00045
      } else if (path_id == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
         mean = mean_plant 
      } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
         mean = 0 
      } 
    } else {
      if (path_id == 'sameEv-sameSchema') {
         mean = 0.00024
      } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-sameSchema') {
         mean = 0.00014
      } else if (path_id == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
         mean = 0
      } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
         mean = -0.00014
      }
    }
   corr_list = c(corr_list, mean)
   lb_list = c(lb_list, mean - b_sd)
   ub_list = c(ub_list, mean + b_sd)
      
  }
  raw_df$corr = corr_list
  raw_df$lower_bound = lb_list
  raw_df$upper_bound = ub_list
  return(raw_df)
}


get_event_specific_offdiag_ideal_corr = function(raw_df) {
 # browser()
  corr_list = rep(0, length(raw_df$path_id))
  lb_list = rep(0, length(raw_df$path_id))
  ub_list = rep(0, length(raw_df$path_id))
  path_ids = unique(raw_df$path_id)
  index = 0
  mean_x = 0
  mean_y = 0
  for (tr in 1:15) {
    index = index + 1
    tr = raw_df$tr[index]
    #browser()
   # mean_x = mean_x + rnorm(1, mean = 0, sd = 0.005)
   # mean_y = mean_y + rnorm(1, mean = 0, sd = 0.005)
    b_sd = 0.0009
    xy_sd =  0.00002
    mean_x = rnorm(1, mean = 0, sd = xy_sd)
    mean_y = mean_x#rnorm(1, mean = 0, sd = xy_sd)
    for (path_id in path_ids) {
      indices = (raw_df$tr == tr & raw_df$path_id == path_id)
      path_sd = -0.0000
      if (path_id == 'sameEv-sameSchema') {
         mean = 0.0002
      } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-sameSchema') {
         mean = 0.0001
      } else if (path_id == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
         mean = 0
      } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
         mean = -0.0001
      }
     corr_list[indices] = mean
     lb_list[indices] = mean - b_sd
     ub_list[indices] = mean + b_sd
    }


  }
  raw_df$corr = corr_list
  raw_df$lower_bound = lb_list
  raw_df$upper_bound = ub_list
  return(raw_df)
}

get_schema_specific_ideal_corr = function(raw_df) {
  corr_list = c()
  lb_list = c()
  ub_list = c()
  index = 0
  mean_plant = 0.05
  b_sd = 0.0001
  for (path_id in raw_df$path_id) {
    index = index + 1
    if (path_id == 'sameEv-sameSchema') {
       mean = 0.003
       corr_list = c(corr_list, mean)
       lb_list = c(lb_list, mean - b_sd)
       ub_list = c(ub_list, mean + b_sd)
       
    } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-sameSchema') {
       mean = 0.0035
       corr_list = c(corr_list, mean)
       lb_list = c(lb_list, mean - b_sd)
       ub_list = c(ub_list, mean + b_sd)
       
    } else if (path_id == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
       mean =  0
       corr_list = c(corr_list, mean)
       lb_list = c(lb_list, mean - b_sd)
       ub_list = c(ub_list, mean + b_sd)
       
    } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
       mean = 0.0005
       corr_list = c(corr_list, mean)
       lb_list = c(lb_list, mean - b_sd)
       ub_list = c(ub_list, mean + b_sd)
    }
  }
  raw_df$corr = corr_list
  raw_df$lower_bound = lb_list
  raw_df$upper_bound = ub_list
  return(raw_df)
}



get_path_specific_ideal_corr = function(raw_df) {
  corr_list = c()
  lb_list = c()
  ub_list = c()
  index = 0
  mean_plant = 0.05
  b_sd = 0.0009
  for (path_id in raw_df$path_id) {
    index = index + 1
    if (path_id == 'sameEv-sameSchema') {
       mean = 0.0029
       corr_list = c(corr_list, mean)
       lb_list = c(lb_list, mean - b_sd)
       ub_list = c(ub_list, mean + b_sd)
       
    } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-sameSchema') {
       mean = 0.0006
       corr_list = c(corr_list, mean)
       lb_list = c(lb_list, mean - b_sd)
       ub_list = c(ub_list, mean + b_sd)
       
    } else if (path_id == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
       mean =  -0.0006
       corr_list = c(corr_list, mean)
       lb_list = c(lb_list, mean - b_sd)
       ub_list = c(ub_list, mean + b_sd)
       
    } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
       mean = 0
       corr_list = c(corr_list, mean)
       lb_list = c(lb_list, mean - b_sd)
       ub_list = c(ub_list, mean + b_sd)
    }
  }
  raw_df$corr = corr_list
  raw_df$lower_bound = lb_list
  raw_df$upper_bound = ub_list
  return(raw_df)
}


get_rotated_ideal_corr = function(raw_df) {
  corr_list = c()
  lb_list = c()
  ub_list = c()
  index = 0
  mean_plant = 0.05
  b_sd = 0.01
  for (path_id in raw_df$path_id) {
    index = index + 1
    if (path_id == 'sameEv-sameSchema') {
       mean = -mean_plant + rnorm(1, mean = 0, sd = 0.005)
       corr_list = c(corr_list, mean)
       lb_list = c(lb_list, mean - b_sd)
       ub_list = c(ub_list, mean + b_sd)
       
    } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-sameSchema') {
       mean = mean_plant + rnorm(1, mean = 0, sd = 0.005)
       corr_list = c(corr_list, mean)
       lb_list = c(lb_list, mean - b_sd)
       ub_list = c(ub_list, mean + b_sd)
       
    } else if (path_id == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
       mean = mean_plant  + rnorm(1, mean = 0, sd = 0.005)
       corr_list = c(corr_list, mean)
       lb_list = c(lb_list, mean - b_sd)
       ub_list = c(ub_list, mean + b_sd)
       
    } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
       mean = -mean_plant  + rnorm(1, mean = 0, sd = 0.005)
       corr_list = c(corr_list, mean)
       lb_list = c(lb_list, mean - b_sd)
       ub_list = c(ub_list, mean + b_sd)
    }
  }
  raw_df$corr = corr_list
  raw_df$lower_bound = lb_list
  raw_df$upper_bound = ub_list
  return(raw_df)
}


get_rotated_specific_3by3 = function(raw_df) {
  corr_list = c()
  lb_list = c()
  ub_list = c()
  index = 0
  mean_plant = 0.0031
  b_sd = 0.0009
  for (path_id in raw_df$path_id) {
    index = index + 1
    template_id = raw_df$event_template_id[index]
    matching_id = raw_df$event_matching_id[index]
    if (template_id == 2 & matching_id == 2) {
      if (path_id == 'sameEv-sameSchema') {
         mean = mean_plant + 0.00045
      } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-sameSchema') {
         mean = 0 + 0.00045
      } else if (path_id == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
         mean = mean_plant 
      } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
         mean = 0 
      } 
    } else if (template_id == 2 & matching_id == 3) {
      if (path_id == 'sameEv-sameSchema') {
         mean = 0 + 0.00045
      } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-sameSchema') {
         mean = mean_plant + 0.00045
      } else if (path_id == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
         mean = 0
      } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
         mean = mean_plant
      } 
    }  else if (template_id == 3 & matching_id == 2) {
      if (path_id == 'sameEv-sameSchema') {
         mean = 0 + 0.00045
      } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-sameSchema') {
         mean = mean_plant 
      } else if (path_id == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
         mean = mean_plant + 0.00045
      } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
         mean = 0
      } 
    } else if (template_id == 3 & matching_id == 3) {
      if (path_id == 'sameEv-sameSchema') {
         mean = mean_plant + 0.0022
      } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-sameSchema') {
         mean = 0 + 0.00045
      } else if (path_id == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
         mean = mean_plant - 0.00045
      } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
         mean = mean_plant
      } 
    } else {
      if (path_id == 'sameEv-sameSchema') {
         mean = 0.00024
      } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-sameSchema') {
         mean = 0.00014
      } else if (path_id == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
         mean = 0
      } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
         mean = -0.00014
      }
    }
   corr_list = c(corr_list, mean)
   lb_list = c(lb_list, mean - b_sd)
   ub_list = c(ub_list, mean + b_sd)
      
  }
  raw_df$corr = corr_list
  raw_df$lower_bound = lb_list
  raw_df$upper_bound = ub_list
  return(raw_df)
}



get_null_3by3 = function(raw_df) {
  corr_list = c()
  lb_list = c()
  ub_list = c()
  index = 0
  b_sd = 0.0009
  mean_plant = 0.0031
  for (path_id in raw_df$path_id) {
    index = index + 1
    template_id = raw_df$event_template_id[index]
    matching_id = raw_df$event_matching_id[index]
    if (path_id == 'sameEv-sameSchema') {
       mean = 0.0002
    } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-sameSchema') {
       mean = 0.0001
    } else if (path_id == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
       mean = 0
    } else if (path_id == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
       mean = -0.0001
    }
   corr_list = c(corr_list, mean)
   lb_list = c(lb_list, mean - b_sd)
   ub_list = c(ub_list, mean + b_sd)
      
  }
  raw_df$corr = corr_list
  raw_df$lower_bound = lb_list
  raw_df$upper_bound = ub_list
  return(raw_df)
}



```

```{r}
loadfonts(device = "pdf", quiet = TRUE)

plot_raw_fingerprint_cluster = function(raw_df, cluster_id, n_clusters, ordering = c('sameEv-sameSchema', 'otherEv-sameSchema', 'otherEv-otherSchema', 'sameEv-otherSchema')) {
   corr_list = raw_df$corr
   lower_bound_list = raw_df$lower_bound
   upper_bound_list = raw_df$upper_bound
   
    template_tag = "campfire/flower"
    template_tag = "coin/torch"
    template_tag = "egg/painting"
    ggplot(raw_df, aes(tr,corr)) +
        geom_line(aes(color = path_id, group = path_id)) +
        geom_ribbon(alpha = 0.2, aes(x = tr, ymin = lower_bound, ymax = upper_bound, group = path_id, fill = path_id)) +
        facet_grid(event_matching_id ~ event_template_id ) +
        xlab("TR") +
        ylab("neural similarity (correlation)") +
        ggtitle(paste("", sep = "")) + 
        scale_fill_discrete(
                      breaks= ordering,
                      labels= ordering) +
         scale_colour_discrete(breaks=ordering, labels=ordering) +
         #ylim(-0.01, 0.01) +
        theme(text=element_text(family="sans"))
  
 

}    
```

```{r}
get_raw_df_path = function(n_clusters_in, cluster_id_in, distill_it, exaggerated_0, weight_it, cap_zero, threshold, by_sil) {
  if (distill_it == FALSE) {
    path = paste("/scratch/gpfs/rk1593/clustering_output/kmeans_fingerprints_tval/kmeans_", as.character(n_clusters_in), "clusters_tval.csv", sep = "")
  } else {
    path = paste("/scratch/gpfs/rk1593/clustering_output/kmeans_fingerprints_tval/kmeans_",  as.character(n_clusters_in), "clusters_tval", sep = "")
    if (by_sil) {
      path = paste(path, "_by_silhouttes", sep = "")
      
    } else {
      if (exaggerated_0) {
        path = paste(path, "_Consider0_T", as.character(threshold), sep = "")
      } else {
        path = paste(path, "_NoConsider0", sep = "")
      }
      
      if (weight_it) {
        path = paste(path, "_WeightByMean", sep = "")
      } else {
        path = paste(path, "_NoWeightByMean", sep = "")
      }
         
      if (cap_zero) {
        path = paste(path, "_CapZero", sep = "")
      } else {
        path = paste(path, "_NoCapZero", sep = "")
      }
    }
   
    path = paste(path, "_", as.character(distill_numLights), "distill_numLights.csv", sep = "")
    
  }
  print(path)
  return(path)
}
```


```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
n_clusters_in = 5
cluster_id_in = 2
exaggerated_0 = FALSE
weight_it = TRUE
cap_zero = FALSE
distill_it = FALSE
distill_numLights = 0.5
threshold = 0.5
by_sil = FALSE



print(get_raw_df_path(n_clusters_in, cluster_id_in, distill_it,
                                  exaggerated_0, weight_it, cap_zero, 
                                  threshold, by_sil))
raw_df = read.csv(get_raw_df_path(n_clusters_in, cluster_id_in, distill_it,
                                  exaggerated_0, weight_it, cap_zero, 
                                  threshold, by_sil))

raw_df = filter(raw_df, cluster_id == cluster_id_in, 
                         event_matching_id == 2 | event_matching_id == 3 | event_matching_id == 4)


# these lines of code replace the observed data in raw_df with idealized plots
#raw_df = get_event_specific_ideal_corr(raw_df)
#raw_df = get_event_specific_offdiag_ideal_corr(raw_df)
#raw_df = get_path_specific_ideal_corr(raw_df)
#raw_df = get_rotated_ideal_corr(raw_df)
#raw_df = get_schema_specific_ideal_corr(raw_df)
#raw_df = get_event_specific_3by3(raw_df)
#raw_df = get_null_3by3(raw_df)

# this changes the labels
raw_df$event_matching_id = get_new_matching_ids(raw_df)
raw_df$event_template_id = get_new_template_ids(raw_df)

plot_raw_fingerprint_cluster(raw_df, cluster_id_in,  n_clusters_in, ordering = c('sameEv-sameSchema' , 'otherEv-otherSchema', 'sameEv-otherSchema', 'otherEv-sameSchema'))

ggsave(filename = "arial-null-obs.pdf")

```
